name: git-preflight-clean-sync
default_program: [stages: preflight>detect>verify>handoff | scope: repo | policy: safety-first,deterministic-output | output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: REMOTE_NAME
required_inputs.description: Remote name to fetch/prune. Default: origin.

required_inputs.name: REQUIRED_BRANCHES
required_inputs.description: Branches that must exist locally or remotely before mutation steps.

required_inputs.name: REQUIRED_TAGS
required_inputs.description: Tags that must exist before release steps.
